howToUse.sectionSubtitle: Use it correctly for optimal odor control

steps.s1: Place the bag where odor needs control
steps.s3: No need to open the bag

video.title: Sun-drying the right way
video.caption: Sun dry 30 minutes | 10am–2pm | Helps restore absorption

warnItems.i1: Do not let the bag contact water

lifeItems.i3: Too frequent sun-drying may shorten lifecycle (~12 months)

cardB.tag: Odor absorber with essential oil scent

steps.s1: Place in a dry, ventilated area

cardB.videoLabel: DO NOT sun-dry while scent remains

video.title: DO NOT sun-dry while scent remains
video.caption: Avoid direct sunlight | Sunlight evaporates fragrance faster

noSunItems.i1: Do NOT place under direct sunlight

whenScentLessItems.i2: Then continue using for better odor control
whenScentLessItems.i3: Total odor-control time may extend to ~1 year

hero.headline: Audit, tax and corporate advisory — delivered with discipline
hero.desc: IFRS Auditing supports financial statement audits, tax consulting, accounting, valuation, IFRS/VAS and compliance-related advisory — aligned with your governance needs.

about.title: An independent audit partner for transparent reporting
about.desc: IFRS Auditing works with businesses across audit, accounting and compliance advisory with a clear and professional engagement approach.
about.alt: Introductory visual for IFRS Auditing Company Limited

services.title: Audit, tax, accounting and advisory in one structured service suite
services.desc: From financial statements, tax advisory, valuation to IFRS/VAS, our services help businesses keep control and make better decisions.
